title: Libanotis condensata
taxonomy: Libanotis condensata is classified within the plant family Apiaceae. This family is commonly known as the carrot or parsley family and includes a wide variety of plants. Libanotis condensata is further classified within the genus Libanotis, which is a group of plants native to the Mediterranean region. The genus Libanotis is part of the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. It is also known as the parsley family due to its similar plant structures.
